title: Assistant Store Manager - Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome
company: Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates:
Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates!
